ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the movie */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDB rating of the movie */,
  "rotten_t_rating" REAL /* Rotten Tomatoes rating of the movie */,
  "dif" REAL /* Difference between IMDB and Rotten Tomatoes ratings */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast of the movie */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Synopsis of the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Adventure, Crime) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the director record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the director record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie being rated */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was recorded */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDB rating of the movie on the given date */,
  "rotten_t_rating" REAL /* Rotten Tomatoes rating of the movie on the given date */,
  "dif" REAL /* Difference between IMDB and Rotten Tomatoes ratings on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., create, read, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "notification" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report record */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., movie ratings, user activity) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
